string-array.name: whats_new_items
string-array.item: CorpseFinder — find & reclaim real GB left by uninstalled apps (PRO)
App deep clean + dedicated WhatsApp / Telegram / Discord / TikTok cleaners (PRO)
Battery health, charging session log and per-app drain estimate (PRO)
Interactive storage treemap — see what\'s eating your space at a glance (PRO)
Free insights: Notification Stats (top 7-day spammers), Hibernation suggestions, pre-uninstall preview
Optional Shizuku integration (off by default) — wiring ready for the next update
Honest brand kept: every byte we report is a real measured byte
